# Pulse Iran (palsiran.com)

> Persian-language news aggregator covering Iran and world news from 45+ sources — unbiased, real-time, with political bias labeling.

## Sections

- / — Homepage: latest breaking news, currency prices, category filters
- /prices — Live exchange rates: USD, EUR, GBP, AED, TRY, gold, coins (updated every 5 minutes)
- /categories — Browse news by category: politics, economy, international, sports, society
- /archive — Full news archive with date and source filters
- /search — Full-text search across all articles
- /sources — Directory of all monitored news sources with political lean indicators
- /source/[slug] — Individual source profile: description, political lean, credibility score, article feed
- /lean/[slug] — Articles and sources grouped by political lean (11 categories)
- /about — About Pulse Iran, methodology, and editorial principles
- /about/editorial-policy — Editorial methodology: source selection, political lean classification, AI summarization policy
- /article/[id]/[slug] — Individual news articles with source attribution and AI summary
- /feed.xml — RSS feed with latest 30 articles

## Political Lean Categories

Pulse Iran classifies sources into 11 political lean categories:
- /lean/rasmi-dolati — رسمی دولتی (Official state media)
- /lean/osoulgarayan — اصولگرا (Conservative/Principlist)
- /lean/mohafezeh-kar-mianeh — محافظه‌کار میانه (Moderate Conservative)
- /lean/eslah-talab — اصلاح‌طلب (Reformist)
- /lean/eslah-talab-mianeh — اصلاح‌طلب میانه (Centrist Reformist)
- /lean/mostaghel — مستقل (Independent)
- /lean/liberal-gharbi — لیبرال غربی (Western Liberal)
- /lean/liberal-amrikai — لیبرال آمریکایی (American Liberal)
- /lean/chap-liberal — چپ لیبرال (Liberal Left)
- /lean/mokhalef-jomhouri-eslami — مخالف جمهوری اسلامی (Anti-IRI)
- /lean/mohafezeh-kar-arabi — محافظه‌کار عربی (Arab Conservative)

## Language

Primary language: Persian (fa)
Direction: RTL

## Content Policy

- News articles are aggregated from Telegram channels and verified Iranian/international news agencies
- Each article links back to the original source
- Prices are updated every 5 minutes from live market data
- Content is summarized using AI (150+ words) with source attribution preserved
- Sources are classified by political lean across 11 categories
- Multi-source verification: articles confirmed by 3+ independent sources are marked as verified

## Usage Restrictions

- Search indexing and real-time retrieval: permitted
- AI-generated search summaries and citations: permitted
- AI model training or fine-tuning: prohibited
- Automated scraping without written permission: prohibited

## Contact

Website: https://palsiran.com
Email: info@palsiran.com
Telegram: https://t.me/palsiran
X/Twitter: https://x.com/palsiran_news
